series_metadata.series_description: Record includes worksheets, statistical information and rational for allocating administrative costs for the agency.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 3 years and 4 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits have been completed and released, and all discrepancies have been resolved. ; Paper: Retain in office 3 years and 4 yearsin the records center, then destroyprovided audits have beencompleted and released, and alldiscrepancies have been resolved., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
